emails.body:
LCDR Maddox,

Your personalized rate check takes 90 seconds. No impact to credit score.

This is a marketing communication. If you prefer not to receive rate updates, unsubscribe here.

LCDR Maddox,

July is historically one of the best months to buy — less competition, motivated sellers, and rates trending in your favor.

Your homebuying checklist:
✓ Get pre-approved (takes ~10 min)
✓ Set your budget & must-haves
✓ Find a local agent we trust
✓ Tour homes & make an offer
✓ Close on your timeline

We'll walk you through every step. VA loans close in as little as 21 days.
